description: Full game rewrite from 700 to 1,589 lines. Added 11 major systems: factions, hero ascension, gear enhancement, endless tower, shard system, rate-up banners, extended quests, guild raids, hero codex, enhanced summon, ambient music.
In-game feedback system deployed. Players can submit reports via Settings → Feedback.
Cron jobs activated: feedback-check (6h), auto-improver (12h), daily-deploy (6am). Autonomous pipeline live.
Studio portal restructured to monorepo. Vercel rewrites configured for clean subdirectory routing.
Flat file structure for Vercel. All pages (/, /about, /admin, /blog, /press) at root, all returning 200.
Full SEO overhaul: sitemap.xml, robots.txt, FAQ schema, long-tail keywords, 40+ vibe coding tools directory, resources page.
Removed all fake/mock data from site. Real stats, real agent logs, real content only.
All 7 games + 6 tools added to studio portal: Glitchfront 194x, Aethoria Online, Helix Hex, Aura Depths, Crown Chaser, VibeGame.
Premium 2026 branding: Orbitron+Inter fonts, animated hero grid, IntersectionObserver scroll reveals, 3D card hover effects, Studio badge.
AI Game Suggestion Board launched. Users submit game ideas, AI evaluates and builds them, public status tracking.
